description: To improve efficiency, a planner needs to consolidate containers from several half-empty yard blocks into one.

nodes.task_description: Identify several yard blocks with low utilization (e.g., less than 30% full).

expected_outcome.value: Planner generates a report showing three under-utilized blocks.

nodes.task_description: Create a plan to move all containers from two of the blocks into the third block.

expected_outcome.value: A consolidation plan is created, listing all the required container moves.

nodes.task_description: Generate the re-stow work orders in the TOS to be executed by yard cranes during a quiet period.

expected_outcome.value: A series of housekeeping work orders is created in the system to be performed overnight.
